title: IE's Tweaks (Fabric)
description: Add some small useful tweaks for vanilla to let it more immersive.
body:
An authorized fabric port of **[IE's Tweaks](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/ies-tweaks)** original by [InfernalEclipse](https://legacy.curseforge.com/members/InfernalEclipse/projects). Permission sees in `Gallery` tab.

Due to origin is ARR, I'm using pure mixin to implement it by its feature describe. Maybe some detail differs.

This port is free open source under MIT License, but DO NOT use in a commercial way.

# 

Original describe:

This is a small collection of changes that I feel should be in vanilla

- Pigs have between 1-3 babies when bred
- Horses are 20% faster
- Zombies take 20% less knockback
- Recieving more than 6 damage from a single hit will give you blindness for 3s
- Sleeping will reduce your hunger by 6 points

# 

There are some different since 1.0.2:

- Measure in percentage instead of static point to consume your hunger when you skipped night through bed. Up to 10 points when whole night skipped.
- Measure in percentage instead of static point to give you blinding effect. Now damage needs 33% of your max health. So it's still 6 points in normal.

#

1.0.3:

- Mob will get slowness when gets fall damage, with duration and strengh based on damage amount
